case_title: AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK VS. TAI CHAN et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: VENUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-23-2012 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 2:00 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
